en: Then your hands at the wrists. Next, your nose.
ko: 발목 아래, 손목에 손을 두고, 코 옆에.

en: And then my tongue, I suppose. I killed you too quickly the last time.
A mistake I don't mean to duplicate tonight. I wasn't finished!
ko: 오늘 밤은 그런 실수를 반복하고 싶지 않아.

en: The next thing you lose will be your left eye, followed by your right.
ko: 아직 끝나지 않았어. 다음에 잃게 될 것은 왼쪽 눈, 그 다음은 오른쪽이야.

en: And then my ears, I understand. Let's get on with it. Wrong!
Your ears you keep, and I'll tell you why.
ko: 틀렸어! 귀는 그대로 두고, 이유를 말해줄게.

en: So that every shriek of every child at seeing your hideousness will be yours to cherish.
ko: 네 끔찍한 모습을 보고 소리치는 모든 아이들의 비명은 네가 간직할 것이야.

en: Every babe that weeps at your approach, every woman who cries out, Dear God, what is that thing?
ko: 네가 다가올 때 우는 모든 아기, 외치는 모든 여성들,

en: Will echo in your perfect ears.
ko: "신이시여, 저건 뭐죠?"라는 소리는 네 완벽한 귀에 울려 퍼질 거야.

en: That is what to the pain means.
It means I leave you in anguish, wallowing in freakish misery forever.
ko: 네가 괴로움 속에서 영원히 허우적거리게 남겨두겠다는 뜻이야.

en: I think you're bluffing. It's possible, pig.
I might be bluffing. It's conceivable, you miserable, vomitous mess.
I'm only lying here because I lack the strength to stand.
ko: 나는 말할 힘이 없어서 여기 누워 있는 것뿐이야.
